agent_system.details: All 4 agent types (Planner, Coder, Reviewer, Executor) instantiated and executed successfully

communication_layer.details: Inter-agent communication via task execution successful - data flowed Planner → Coder → Reviewer → Executor

trace_viewer.details: Cognitive trace viewer capturing all agent actions with timestamps - 8 trace events recorded

auto_scaling.details: Scaling manager monitoring agent status and workload - system maintains optimal agent distribution
